name: Crunchy Crab Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 1 lb loaf of Vienna bread or French Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bread into 1-inch slices and remove crusts.
2. Cut trimmed slices into 1-1/2 inch cubes.
3. Hollow out each cube, leaving a shell about 1/8 inch thick.
4. Brush the sides and tops of the cubes with melted butter.
5. Place on a cookie sheet (sheets) and bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes or until the nuggets are lightly browned and crisp. Remove from oven and cool.
6. Remove all cartilage from crabmeat.
7. In a bowl, blend cheese and egg. Add Worcestershire sauce, lemon and pepper seasoning, mustard, and garlic powder; gently mix in crabmeat.
8. Fill the nuggets with crabmeat mixture, sprinkle paprika over tops.
9. Place on cookie sheets (sheets) and bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit until hot and bubbly, 5 to 10 minutes.
Note: If desired, cocktail canape' shells may be substituted for nuggets. Crabmeat mixture will make three dozen canapes'.
